page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfr7.8xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by an Intel Xeon 8369HB processor running at 3.3 GHz. This instance features 32 dedicated physical cores and 32 vCPUs, operating with a single thread per core configuration. It is equipped with 256.0 GB of system memory, providing a ratio of 8.0 GB of RAM per core. The CPU cache configuration includes 32 KB of L1d cache, 1.0 MB of L2 cache, and 33 MB of L3 cache. The instance runs on a KVM hypervisor.

This server type does not include local NVMe or SSD storage, meaning all storage must be network-attached. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 10 Gbps. Additionally, the instance does not include any complimentary public IPv4 addresses. There are no hardware accelerators or GPUs bundled with this configuration.

In benchmark evaluations, the ecs.hfr7.8xlarge demonstrates average performance across most metrics, with a stress-ng single-core CPU score of 1571.09 and a multi-core score of 33012.14. Memory bandwidth tests show an average read-only small block cached speed of 1856.97 GB/sec and a large block uncached speed of 165.51 GB/sec. However, it exhibits strong performance in large block uncached memory write bandwidth, reaching 93.48 GB/sec. Single-threaded gzip compression and multi-threaded bzip3 decompression scores align with average tier expectations. From a cost-efficiency perspective, the dedicated core allocation and high memory-to-vCPU ratio provide a stable resource density for memory-bound workloads without the overhead of hyperthreading.

The high memory capacity of 256.0 GB combined with 32 dedicated cores makes this instance suitable for memory-intensive applications, database hosting, enterprise applications, and memory-cached web serving. The lack of local storage and GPUs limits its applicability for local high-speed scratch disk operations or hardware-accelerated machine learning tasks.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfr7.8xlarge is an x86_64 server instance powered by a 3.3 GHz Intel Xeon 8369HB processor. It features 32 dedicated physical cores and 32 vCPUs with a single thread per core, paired with 256.0 GB of RAM, establishing an 8.0 GB per core memory ratio. The instance lacks local storage and GPU accelerators, relying on network-attached storage and offering a 10 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. Benchmark data indicates average performance in CPU and read memory bandwidth tests, but strong performance in large block uncached memory write bandwidth at 93.48 GB/sec. Given its high memory-to-vCPU ratio and dedicated CPU allocation, this instance is suitable for memory-optimized workloads, database deployments, and enterprise applications requiring consistent compute and memory resources without hyperthreading overhead.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfr7.8xlarge is an x86_64 server with 32 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 256 GB RAM, and 10 Gbps bandwidth. It is designed for memory-intensive workloads and database hosting.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfr7.8xlarge features 32 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 256 GB RAM, and 10 Gbps network bandwidth for memory-intensive workloads.
tagline: A dedicated 32-core Intel Xeon server featuring 256 GB of RAM, optimized for memory-intensive enterprise workloads and database deployments.

256.0 GB of system memory providing 8.0 GB of RAM per core
Strong uncached memory write bandwidth of 93.48 GB/sec
10 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with zero complimentary public IPv4 addresses
